# Oil Based Fluids

**Summary**: Drilling fluids that use oil as the primary base.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] evaluated the usage of oil-based-fluids and their associated waste management.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] OBF provides superior lubrication but requires stricter waste management due to toxicity.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] Survey of company usage frequency.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 31.6% of respondent companies used OBF. ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012, p. 131]])
